title: TaskState
description: A profile's money-aware tasks with their live links, schedule, and sync status (FR-TASK-001/003). Provided by Module 7 to Habits, Inbox, Workspace, and the originating modules. Tasks holds NO copy of a linked money figure — money values are read from the source contract at display time; only the link reference (id + contract version) is stored here. freshness reflects the schedule's dependence on CashFlowForecast (a stale forecast withholds payday-aware placement). Recommend/record-only: nothing here moves money (FR-X-003).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. Cross-profile reads are authZ-checked server-side against the session identity + Household MemberScope, never a client-supplied id (threat model IDOR).

title.description: User-authored title; displayed VERBATIM (not translated). Redacted from debug logs (may contain merchant/amount hints).

notes.description: Optional user-authored notes; verbatim, not translated; redacted from debug logs.

is_money_aware.description: true iff the task carries a TaskLink to a financial entity; false for plain unlinked to-dos.

link.description: Live link to a financial entity. Null for unlinked tasks. Holds the reference ONLY — never a copy of a money value.

entity_id.description: Id of the linked entity in its owning module/contract.

source_contract.description: Owning contract $id + version this link reads from, e.g. 'finos:spine/GoalState/1.0.0' or 'finos:bills/BillCalendar/1.0.0'. Version skew disables the link (SC-T-010).

link_status.description: live = source present & version-compatible; orphaned = source entity deleted (no write-back on completion); unavailable = owning module/contract not yet shipped or version-skewed (degrades gracefully).

scheduled_date.description: Day the task is placed. Null when placement is withheld/unscheduled.

placement_source.description: How the date was chosen. withheld_stale_forecast = CashFlowForecast was stale/absent, so payday-aware placement was WITHHELD (never guessed — FR-X-008). manual is never overwritten by auto-scheduling.

reasoning.description: Why this placement (which payday / which due date / the linked entity's freshness). Required when placement_source = payday_aware (FR-X-006).

sync_status.description: Status write-back outcome for a completed money-aware task. pending_sync = write-back failed/timed out and is being retried with backoff (FR-X-012); not shown as reconciled until the owning module confirms.

data_completeness.description: partial when some source modules (e.g. Bills/Pay) are absent and some links are unavailable (Partial state).

freshness.description: Schedule freshness derives from CashFlowForecast; a stale forecast flags payday-aware placements (FR-X-008).
